positive: A vibrant, stylized depiction of a mountain landscape at sunrise. The foreground features clean, silhouetted outlines of diverse flora (pines, wildflowers, ferns) arranged in a central composition. The background shows sharp, layered mountain peaks with soft gradient color washes of warm orange, deep purple, and misty blue tones. The style is modern flat design illustration with a clean vector aesthetic, high contrast, and minimal texture. The composition must be perfectly centered and scalable for apparel printing. Focus on clean lines and dynamic negative space.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grainy, photo, realistic, logos, trademarks, text, signature
